phases.label: The Why
phases.description: Announce the ride, tell the story, set the target. Personal connection through admiration for Simon Mottram and Rapha's commitment, not direct personal experience with autism. Honesty about that is the angle.

phases.label: The Journey
phases.description: Training milestones, Fred Whitton as proving ground, fundraising progress. Mix vulnerability with determination.

phases.label: The Push
phases.description: Countdown, final fundraising sprint, ride day, post-ride reflection. Last 2 weeks typically drive 40-50% of donations.

author.name: Guil
author.background: Portuguese, based in Leeds. Cyclist. Works in healthcare technology (medical imaging, PACS, digital pathology). Came to this cause through admiration for Simon Mottram (Rapha founder) and his personal commitment to this charity, not through personal experience with autism.
